final_answer: From the search results, it seems that the main course menu for Virtue restaurant in Chicago on March 22, 2021, included dishes like Marché and Dinner. However, on April 21, 2021, these dishes were no longer on the menu. Therefore, the main course that was on the dinner menu for Virtue on March 22, 2021, but not on April 21, 2021, was Marché.
